name: hero-banner
prompt: Minimal hero banner design. White background taking up full space. Center: "Building Intelligence" in large charcoal (#1c1c1d) text. Below in smaller grey: "Data • Engineering • Impact". Single thin horizontal line in ember orange (#D95B43) below the text, about 1/3 the width of the text. Absolutely minimal. No graphics, no patterns, just typography and one accent line. Inter font.
